title: operation
text: operation A script module that can be activated from other script modules, either from within the current component or from another component. It is analogous to a method in other programming languages, and is declared with operation ProcScript statement. Related Links Operations Operations are ProcScript modules that are analogous to methods in other programming languages; they perform specific actions and can be activated by other ProcScript modules, and even by non-Uniface components.
